title: Microsoft Announces Major Job Cuts and Xbox Restructuring
subtitle: The tech giant is cutting 4,800 jobs as it shifts focus toward artificial intelligence and its most popular gaming franchises.

summary.en: Microsoft has announced that it will cut 4,800 jobs, representing about 2% of its global workforce. A large portion of these layoffs will occur within the Xbox gaming division. The company is spinning off four game studios to operate independently. This decision is part of a larger strategy to focus on artificial intelligence and high-profit gaming projects. Leadership stated that these changes are necessary to keep the company competitive in a fast-changing industry.
summary.zh: 微軟宣布將裁減四千八百名員工，約占其全球人力資源的百分之二。這些裁員中有很大一部分將發生在 Xbox 遊戲部門。該公司正將四家遊戲工作室分拆出去以獨立運作。此決策是專注於人工智慧與高利潤遊戲專案之大型策略的一部分。領導層表示，這些變動對於維持公司在快速變化的產業中的競爭力是必要的。

paragraphs.en: Microsoft has announced a significant restructuring plan that will result in 4,800 job losses across the company. This move represents about 2.1% of its total workforce. According to BBC Business, the Xbox gaming division will face the largest impact, with more than 1,600 roles being cut immediately. The company plans to continue these reductions over the coming fiscal year, ultimately affecting nearly 20% of the Xbox workforce by July 2027.
paragraphs.zh: 微軟（Microsoft）宣布了一項重大重組計畫，將導致公司裁減四千八百名員工。此舉約占其總人力資源的百分之二點一。根據英國廣播公司商業新聞（BBC Business）報導，Xbox 遊戲部門將面臨最大衝擊，超過一千六百個職位將立即遭到裁撤。該公司計畫在接下來的會計年度持續進行縮編，預計到二零二七年七月，將影響近百分之二十的 Xbox 員工。

paragraphs.en: Amy Coleman, an executive vice president at Microsoft, explained in a memo to employees that the company must adapt to a "fast-changing industry." She noted that while these roles are not being replaced by artificial intelligence (AI), the rise of AI is fundamentally changing how work is performed. The Verge reports that Microsoft is currently investing billions of dollars into AI-ready data centers and computing power, which has become a primary financial priority for the business.
paragraphs.zh: 微軟執行副總裁艾咪·柯爾曼（Amy Coleman）在給員工的備忘錄中解釋，公司必須適應這個「快速變化的產業」。她指出，雖然這些職位並非被人工智慧（AI）所取代，但人工智慧的興起正從根本上改變工作執行的方式。科技媒體 The Verge 報導，微軟目前正投入數十億美元於支援人工智慧的資料中心與運算能力，這已成為該企業首要的財務優先事項。

paragraphs.en: For the Xbox division, this period marks a major "reset." Asha Sharma, the new CEO of Xbox, described the current state of the division as unhealthy, noting that its profit margins are significantly lower than those of its main competitors. In a note shared on social media, Sharma explained that the company must change its approach to stay relevant. "History is full of companies that mistake longevity for inevitability," she wrote. "We will not be one of them."
paragraphs.zh: 對於 Xbox 部門而言，這段時期標誌著一次重大的「重置」。Xbox 新任執行長艾莎·夏瑪（Asha Sharma）形容該部門目前的狀態並不健康，並指出其利潤率遠低於主要競爭對手。夏瑪在社群媒體上分享的筆記中解釋，公司必須改變策略以維持競爭力。她寫道：「歷史上充滿了將長壽誤認為必然性的公司，我們絕不會成為其中之一。」

paragraphs.en: As part of this restructuring, Microsoft is changing how it manages its game studios. Four studios—Compulsion Games, Double Fine Productions, Ninja Theory, and Undead Labs—will be spun off. This means they will no longer be part of the Microsoft organization. According to The Verge, Double Fine and Compulsion Games will return to independent management under their original founders. Ninja Theory and Undead Labs are also being sold to new owners, though agreements are in place to ensure their current game projects continue to move forward.
paragraphs.zh: 作為重組的一部分，微軟正在改變其管理遊戲工作室的方式。四家工作室——Compulsion Games、Double Fine Productions、Ninja Theory 以及 Undead Labs——將被分拆出去。這意味著它們將不再隸屬於微軟組織。根據 The Verge 報導，Double Fine 與 Compulsion Games 將回歸由原始創辦人進行獨立管理。Ninja Theory 與 Undead Labs 也正被出售給新買家，不過雙方已達成協議，確保其目前的遊戲專案能繼續推進。

paragraphs.en: Industry experts suggest this shift represents a change in vision for Xbox. Piers Harding-Rolls of Ampere Analysis told the BBC that the company is moving away from owning a large number of smaller studios. Instead, Microsoft appears to be focusing its resources on its biggest and most popular franchises. This strategy is a departure from previous years, when the company bought many studios to build up its subscription service, Game Pass.
paragraphs.zh: 產業專家認為，此轉變代表了 Xbox 願景的改變。Ampere Analysis 的皮爾斯·哈丁-羅爾斯（Piers Harding-Rolls）向英國廣播公司表示，該公司正逐漸放棄擁有大量小型工作室的模式。相反地，微軟似乎將資源集中在規模最大且最受歡迎的系列作品上。此策略與過去幾年大相逕庭，當時該公司為了充實其訂閱服務「遊戲通行證」（Game Pass）而收購了許多工作室。

paragraphs.en: Not all studios are safe from further changes. The Guardian reports that Arkane Studios, which is currently working on a game called Blade, has entered a consultation process in France. This review could lead to further closures or a sale of the studio, as the project has faced delays and budget issues. Meanwhile, other major gaming brands under the Microsoft umbrella, such as Minecraft maker Mojang and Candy Crush developer King, will now report directly to CEO Asha Sharma.
paragraphs.zh: 並非所有工作室都能免於進一步的變動。衛報（The Guardian）報導，目前正在開發《刀鋒戰士》（Blade）遊戲的 Arkane Studios 已在法國進入諮詢程序。由於該專案面臨延宕與預算問題，此審查可能導致工作室進一步關閉或被出售。與此同時，微軟旗下其他大型遊戲品牌，例如《當個創世神》（Minecraft）開發商 Mojang 以及《糖果傳奇》（Candy Crush）開發商 King，未來將直接向執行長艾莎·夏瑪匯報。

paragraphs.en: This announcement follows a difficult period for the gaming industry, which has seen several waves of layoffs in recent years. Microsoft itself has already cut thousands of jobs since its massive acquisition of Activision-Blizzard in 2024. Tech analyst Paolo Pescatore told the BBC that the challenge for Microsoft is not just about cutting costs. The company must now clearly define what Xbox represents in a world where games are played across many different platforms, including consoles, PCs, and cloud services.
paragraphs.zh: 此公告發布於遊戲產業艱困的時期，該產業近年來已歷經數波裁員。微軟自二零二四年大規模收購動視暴雪（Activision-Blizzard）以來，本身已裁減數千個職位。科技分析師保羅·佩斯卡托（Paolo Pescatore）向英國廣播公司表示，微軟面臨的挑戰不僅僅是削減成本。在一個遊戲跨越主機、個人電腦與雲端服務等多種平台運行的世界中，該公司現在必須明確定義 Xbox 的定位。

paragraphs.en: Despite the scale of these cuts, Sharma emphasized that the company is not canceling any publicly announced games. She acknowledged that the news is painful for employees who have dedicated their creativity to the brand. However, she maintained that the restructuring is necessary to ensure a "bigger future" for the division. As Microsoft continues to invest heavily in AI and large-scale infrastructure, the gaming division will now operate with a leaner structure, focusing on its most successful titles to return to growth by 2027.
paragraphs.zh: 儘管裁員規模龐大，夏瑪強調公司並未取消任何已公開的遊戲。她承認，對於那些將創意奉獻給品牌的員工來說，這則消息令人痛苦。然而，她堅持認為重組對於確保該部門擁有「更宏大的未來」是必要的。隨著微軟持續在人工智慧與大型基礎設施上投入重金，遊戲部門未來將以更精簡的結構運作，專注於其最成功的作品，以期在二零二七年恢復成長。

keyTerms.definitionEn: A fresh start or a complete change in the way something is done.
keyTerms.definitionZh: 重新開始；徹底的調整或改變。
keyTerms.noteZh: 常見作動詞（重新設定），這裡作名詞，指公司策略的重大轉向。文中：For the Xbox division, this period marks a major "reset."

keyTerms.definitionEn: To separate a part of a company into a new, independent business.
keyTerms.definitionZh: 分拆（公司部門），使其成為獨立運作的企業。
keyTerms.noteZh: 這是商業用語，指將子公司或部門從母公司分離出去。文中：Four studios—Compulsion Games, Double Fine Productions, Ninja Theory, and Undead Labs—will be spun off.

keyTerms.definitionEn: An action that is different from what was done or planned before.
keyTerms.definitionZh: 背離；與以往不同的做法。
keyTerms.noteZh: 常見作名詞（離開、出發），這裡指策略上的改變或背離舊有模式。文中：This strategy is a departure from previous years, when the company bought many studios to build up its subscription service, Game Pass.

keyTerms.definitionEn: More efficient and using fewer resources or employees.
keyTerms.noteZh: 常見作形容詞（瘦的），這裡指企業組織結構精簡、更有效率。文中：the gaming division will now operate with a leaner structure, focusing on its most successful titles to return to growth by 2027.

sources.name: BBC Business
sources.title: Microsoft cuts 4,800 jobs and shrinks Xbox in 'significant restructure'

sources.name: The Guardian Technology
sources.title: Microsoft cuts 4,800 jobs as it revamps Xbox in latest wave of mass layoffs

sources.name: The Verge
sources.title: Microsoft is selling off four Xbox studios as part of significant gaming cuts

previousArticles.title: Microsoft Announces Major Job Cuts and Xbox Restructuring
previousArticles.summaryEn: Microsoft has announced the loss of 4,800 jobs, with a significant portion affecting its Xbox gaming division. The company is undergoing a major restructuring to improve its financial health and focus on its most popular game franchises. As part of these changes, four game studios will become independent or be sold to new owners. Microsoft leadership stated that these moves are necessary to adapt to a fast-changing industry. The company continues to invest heavily in artificial intelligence, which is reshaping how work is done across the organization.

quiz.question: What is the specific plan for the four game studios mentioned in the restructuring?

options.A: They will be closed down permanently by the end of the fiscal year.
options.B: They will be separated from Microsoft to operate independently or under new owners.
options.C: They will be merged into a single entity under the leadership of Asha Sharma.
options.D: They will focus exclusively on developing games for Microsoft's cloud services.

quiz.explanationZh: 正確答案為 B。根據文章第四段，這四間工作室（Compulsion Games, Double Fine, Ninja Theory, Undead Labs）將被「spun off」（分拆），意即不再屬於微軟組織，部分回歸獨立經營，部分則出售給新買家。選項 A 錯誤，因為文章並未說要永久關閉它們；選項 C 錯誤，因為這些工作室是脫離微軟，而非合併；選項 D 錯誤，文章未提及此類特定的開發策略限制。

quiz.question: What can be inferred about Microsoft's shift in strategy regarding its gaming division?

options.A: Microsoft is abandoning the gaming industry to focus entirely on AI infrastructure.
options.B: The company believes that owning a large number of studios is no longer the best way to ensure profitability.
options.C: Asha Sharma plans to cancel all current game projects to save costs immediately.
options.D: The Xbox division will stop producing consoles and focus only on PC gaming.

quiz.explanationZh: 正確答案為 B。根據第五段，專家指出微軟正從「擁有大量小型工作室」的策略轉向「集中資源在最受歡迎的特許經營權（franchises）」，且第三段提到現有獲利能力低於競爭對手，顯示舊模式已不符需求。選項 A 錯誤，微軟仍在投資遊戲但縮減規模；選項 C 與第八段「不取消任何已公開遊戲」衝突；選項 D 文章並未提及停止生產主機。

quiz.question: In the third paragraph, what does Asha Sharma mean when she says, 'History is full of companies that mistake longevity for inevitability'?

options.A: Companies often wrongly assume that because they have existed for a long time, they will continue to exist forever.
options.B: Companies that have been successful for a long time are destined to fail eventually.
options.C: The longer a company stays in business, the more difficult it becomes to change its management style.
options.D: It is impossible for a company to remain relevant if it relies on its past achievements.

quiz.explanationZh: 正確答案為 A。這裡的「longevity」指長壽（營運時間長），「inevitability」指必然性。這句話意指許多公司誤以為「只要活得夠久，就必然能一直存活下去」，這是一種過度自信的迷思。選項 B 語意過於絕對；選項 C 談論的是管理難度而非生存必然性；選項 D 則偏離了原文對於「存在時間」與「未來命運」之間誤解的討論。

quiz.question: What is the primary message of the article regarding Microsoft's recent actions?

options.A: Microsoft is firing employees primarily because artificial intelligence has replaced their specific job functions.
options.B: The Xbox division is undergoing a major, painful restructuring to prioritize efficiency and focus on successful titles.
options.C: The gaming industry is currently facing a total collapse due to the high costs of developing large-scale infrastructure.
options.D: Asha Sharma is leading a campaign to acquire more studios to compete with other major gaming companies.

quiz.explanationZh: 正確答案為 B。全文重點在於微軟為了應對獲利不佳與產業變化，進行大規模裁員與組織重整，目標是透過精簡架構與專注於核心熱門作品來重回成長。選項 A 與第二段「AI 並未取代這些職位」矛盾；選項 C 誇大了產業狀況；選項 D 與文章提到的「分拆工作室」策略完全相反。
